---
title: "Two-Way ANOVA"
subtitle: "Class Activity"
author: "Andrew Seaman"
date: "2025-Aug-4"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: journal
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
---

<!-- ------ -->
<!-- SETUP: -->
<!-- ------ -->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(mosaic)
library(DT)
library(pander)
library(tidyverse)
```

<!-- Setup End -->





<!-- ---------- -->
<!-- QUESTIONS: -->
<!-- ---------- -->

See the [DayCare.Rmd]("../../Analyses/ANOVA/Examples/DarCare.Rmd") file for notes on this class activity.


<!-- -------- -->
<!-- FILE END -->
<!-- -------- -->
